category_sources: source_facts.description says image processing library; official libvips site describes a fast image processing library with command-line and language bindings.
display_name_sources: Official libvips website uses libvips as the project name; source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repo for libvips.
docs_sources: Official libvips API documentation page is a dedicated documentation surface and links source to github.com/libvips/libvips.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/libvips/libvips, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says image processing library; source_facts.executables lists vips tools; official libvips site describes C, C++, command-line bindings and many image formats.
